meta.project: SPARTA: Sistem Informasi Praktik Kerja Lapangan (PKL)

product_overview: SPARTA is a Laravel-based PKL management system that helps schools coordinate internship applications, daily activities, final reports, and assessment in one place. It streamlines the workflow for students, teachers, industrial supervisors, and admins with role-based access and notifications.
core_goals: Let students submit and track PKL applications from draft through approval
Let students record daily attendance and journal activities during PKL
Let teachers and industrial supervisors review and validate student journals and final reports
Let teachers enter final PKL scores and complete the internship lifecycle
Let admins approve new accounts and assign supervising teachers to PKL applications
Let each user role access only the pages and actions relevant to them

features.name: Authentication & account approval
features.description: Users can sign in with their account, and newly registered accounts must wait for admin approval before they can access the system.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill in registration details -> Submit registration form -> See account created and pending admin approval
Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit login form -> See the dashboard for the signed-in role
Navigate to /login -> Enter credentials for an unapproved account -> Submit login form -> See a message that the account is waiting for admin approval
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Enter account email -> Request a password reset link -> Proceed to the reset password form

features.name: Role-based dashboards and access control
features.description: After login, users are routed to the dashboard for their role, and access to other role areas is restricted.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Sign in as an admin, teacher, student, or industrial supervisor -> See the dashboard for that role
Sign in as a user with one role -> Try to access a different role area -> See access denied

features.name: Student PKL application management
features.description: Students can create a draft PKL application, upload supporting documents, submit it for review, and track the current status and notes.
user_flows: Navigate to /siswa/pengajuan -> Create a new PKL application draft -> Upload the application document -> Save the draft -> See the draft listed
Navigate to /siswa/pengajuan -> Open an editable draft application -> Update the application details or document -> Save changes -> See the updated draft
Navigate to /siswa/pengajuan -> Open a draft application -> Submit the application for review -> See the status change to waiting for approval
Navigate to /siswa/pengajuan -> Open an application -> Review the current status and teacher notes -> See the latest review outcome
Navigate to /siswa/pengajuan -> Try to create or submit another active application while one is already active -> See that only one active application is allowed

features.name: Teacher review of PKL applications
features.description: Teachers can review student applications, decide the outcome, and send the status change back to the student with notes.
user_flows: Navigate to /guru/pengajuan -> Open a student application -> Review the submitted details and supporting document -> Approve the application -> See the status update to approved
Navigate to /guru/pengajuan -> Open a student application -> Review the submitted details and supporting document -> Reject the application -> Add a note -> See the status update to rejected
Navigate to /guru/pengajuan -> Open a student application -> Review the submitted details and supporting document -> Request a revision -> Add a note -> See the status update to revision needed
Navigate to /siswa/pengajuan -> Open the application after teacher review -> See the new status and notes in the application history

features.name: Daily attendance for PKL
features.description: Students can clock in once per day during active PKL, and teachers or industrial supervisors can monitor the attendance record.
user_flows: Navigate to /siswa/absensi -> Clock in for the current day -> See the attendance record saved for that day
Navigate to /siswa/absensi -> Try to clock in again on the same day -> See that only one attendance entry is allowed per day
Navigate to /guru/absensi -> View the attendance list for supervised students -> See each student's attendance history
Navigate to /pembimbing/absensi -> View the attendance list for students at the industrial placement -> See the attendance history for those students

features.name: Student daily journal and validation
features.description: Students can create daily journal entries with optional documentation, and teachers or industrial supervisors can validate them or request revisions.
user_flows: Navigate to /siswa/jurnal -> Create a new journal entry -> Add daily activity details -> Upload optional documentation -> Save the journal -> See the journal listed for review
Navigate to /siswa/jurnal -> Create and save the first journal entry after application approval -> See the PKL status change to ongoing
Navigate to /guru/jurnal -> Open a student journal entry -> Validate the journal -> See the journal status updated to valid
Navigate to /pembimbing/jurnal -> Open a student journal entry -> Validate the journal -> See the journal status updated to valid
Navigate to /guru/jurnal -> Open a student journal entry -> Request a revision -> Add a note -> See the journal status updated to revision needed
Navigate to /siswa/jurnal -> Open a journal that was returned for revision -> Edit the content or documentation -> Save the revised journal -> See the updated entry ready for review

features.name: Final report submission and review
features.description: Students can upload a final PKL report, teachers can approve it or request revisions, and students can resubmit the revised report.
user_flows: Navigate to /siswa/laporan -> Upload the final report file -> Submit the report -> See the report listed for review
Navigate to /guru/laporan -> Open the submitted final report -> Review the report content -> Accept the report -> See the report status updated
Navigate to /guru/laporan -> Open the submitted final report -> Request a revision -> Add a note -> See the report status updated to revision needed
Navigate to /siswa/laporan -> Open a report returned for revision -> Choose to revise the report -> Upload the updated file -> Save the resubmission -> See the revised report sent again for review

features.name: Final PKL scoring
features.description: Teachers can enter final PKL scores for supervised students, and the system completes the PKL process after the score is saved.
user_flows: Navigate to /guru/penilaian -> Open a supervised student's assessment form -> Enter scores for attitude, skills, and report -> Save the assessment -> See the final score recorded and the PKL marked as completed

features.name: Notifications inbox
features.description: Users can open a shared notifications inbox to review system updates such as approval outcomes, journal validation, and report review changes.
user_flows: Navigate to /notifications -> Open the notifications inbox -> Review recent updates -> See status changes and activity notifications

features.name: Admin approval of new users
features.description: Admins can review newly registered users and approve them so they can access the system.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/users/unapproved -> Review the list of newly registered users -> Open a user entry -> Approve the account -> See the user move into approved status

routes.description: Registrasi user baru (perlu approval admin untuk login)
Upload laporan akhir PKL (termasuk upload ulang saat revisi)

features.name: Authentication & approval
features.description: Login Breeze + registrasi user baru memerlukan approval admin sebelum bisa login.
user_interactions: Jika akun belum disetujui, tampil pesan menunggu persetujuan admin

features.name: Role-based dashboards & navigation
features.description: Redirect login berdasarkan role (admin/guru/siswa/pembimbing_industri) dan proteksi route via middleware role.

features.name: Pengajuan PKL (Siswa) + kuota tempat PKL
features.description: Siswa membuat/ubah/ajukan pengajuan; kuota tempat PKL dicek saat buat/ubah/ajukan; hanya 1 pengajuan aktif.

features.name: Validasi Pengajuan (Guru) + notifikasi ke siswa
features.description: Guru menyetujui/menolak/minta revisi pengajuan; mengirim notifikasi status ke siswa.

features.name: Jurnal PKL (Siswa) + validasi (Guru & Pembimbing)
features.description: Siswa upload jurnal; guru/pembimbing dapat validasi atau minta revisi; upload jurnal pertama mengubah pengajuan ke sedang_pkl.
user_interactions: Guru/pembimbing memvalidasi atau minta revisi jurnal

features.name: Laporan akhir (Siswa) + review (Guru) + resubmission revisi
features.description: Siswa upload laporan akhir; guru menerima atau minta revisi; siswa dapat upload ulang saat revisi dan guru mendapat notifikasi.
user_interactions: Guru terima / minta revisi dengan catatan

user_interactions.Jika revisi: siswa klik Perbaiki lalu upload ulang

features.name: Absensi PKL
features.description: Siswa clock-in sekali per hari; guru/pembimbing dapat melihat absensi siswa bimbingan.

features.name: Penilaian akhir PKL (Guru)
features.description: Guru input penilaian (sikap, keterampilan, laporan) dan sistem menghitung nilai_akhir serta menandai pengajuan selesai.
user_interactions: Guru membuka form penilaian siswa bimbingan

known_limitations.issue: composer run dev fails on Windows because Laravel Pail requires pcntl
known_limitations.location: composer.json (script dev calls php artisan pail)
known_limitations.impact: Use php artisan serve + npm run dev separately on Windows
